name: Sweet Onion Sauce- Master Chefs
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Veal Trimmings OR 1 Cup Beef Trimmings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut trimmings into 3/4 inch dice.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and meat, cooking uncovered, stirring occasionally until browned (about 20 minutes).
3. Add vermouth, stirring, then add stock. Bring to a boil and simmer gently, skimming surface often, until sauce reduces to a light syrupy consistency (about 30 minutes or longer).
4. Remove from heat, stir in 2 tablespoons butter. Strain sauce and season with salt and pepper.
5. Warm sauce and serve over crepes.
